reasons: Angela can attach to Aulus when he commits into a fight, giving him extra durability.
Aulus benefits from support that follows him while he chases or dives.

proof.summary: Angela reinforces Aulus during his commit window, helping him continue fighting through the frontline.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Aulus enters the main fight.
Aulus uses the added shield to stay in team range instead of overchasing.
failureCases: Enemy burst or anti-sustain removes the protection value.

reasons: Floryn's global healing can support Aulus while he farms, rotates, or fights away from the support.
Aulus benefits from extra sustain because his fight value rises when he survives long enough to keep attacking.

proof.summary: Floryn gives Aulus remote sustain support, helping him survive extended fights or jungle pressure.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves her team heal for Aulus's real fight timing.
Aulus commits when Floryn's ultimate is available.
failureCases: Aulus is burst before the heal can change the fight.
Aulus fights too deep without teammate follow-up.

reasons: Mathilda helps Aulus enter or reset after committing.
Her shield gives Aulus more safety when he starts a close-range fight.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Aulus movement and shielding, helping him connect to targets and survive the first trade.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda uses Guiding Wind for Aulus's engage or disengage.
Aulus enters after his damage tools are ready.
failureCases: Aulus runs ahead before Mathilda can support.
Mathilda is forced to save another teammate.
Enemy crowd control stops Aulus before he reaches targets.

reasons: Tigreal can start the fight so Aulus does not need to be the first hero entering.
Aulus can follow Tigreal's grouped engage with sustained physical damage.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the crowd-control window, while Aulus follows into the fight with sustained physical damage.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages after Aulus is close enough to follow.
Aulus waits for the setup instead of forcing the first entry.
failureCases: Aulus is kited after the crowd control ends.
Enemy burst removes Aulus before he can continue fighting.

reasons: Rafaela's speed support helps Aulus chase or reposition during skirmishes.
Her healing gives Aulus more staying power before and during extended fights.

proof.summary: Rafaela helps Aulus stay connected to targets and survive longer in extended fights.
worksBestWhen: Aulus uses the speed boost to connect instead of overextending.
failureCases: Aulus is chain-controlled before he can move.
Rafaela is too far away to support.
The enemy disengages after Aulus commits.
